phase: gen-3: 4/9 merged + ops-e2e fixed; building final 5

gen3.rootCauseFix: The /ops e2e (ops.spec.ts) was coupled to live tasks.json (active-unit row + m7/m8 milestones), so orchestrator state edits kept turning main CI red and blocking unrelated unit PRs. Fixed in PR #54 (b144784): relaxed to invariants (column renders even when empty; only always-present m0..m6 milestones). State edits are now safe.
gen3.note: pe-lifecycle/benchmark PRs were rebuilt twice (route-wiring conflicts with the m9-hardening code-splitting rewrite); recovered and merged after the ops fix unblocked main.

reviewBots: CodeRabbit still reviewing (passes); Greptile at 50-review trial cap. Gate = CI + independent adversarial review + visual QA.
